LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_RequestInstallationDes: Request a colonist to bring and install a {0} to enhance this building.
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_CancelInstallationDesc: Cancel the pending subcore installation request.
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_RemoveSubcoreDesc: Request a colonist to remove the installed subcore.
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_CancelRemovalDesc: Cancel the pending subcore removal request.
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_TurretBenefits: Improves targeting systems. Accuracy: +{0} Aim speed: +{1}
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_ChargerBenefits: Implements maintenance protocols. Increased charging speed. Damaged mechs will autonomously seek this charger for repairs.
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_NPDBenefits: Controls meal dispensing and hopper temperature, preventing spoilage. Allows auto-dispensing.
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_CoolerBenefits: Implements inverter mode, heating the room when necessary.
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_HeaterBenefits: Implements remote overload protocol, allowing to use the device as a remote detonator.
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_DrillDepositExhausted: {0} has exhausted its deep deposit and shut down.
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_SubcoreInstalledMessag: A subcore has been installed in {0}.
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_ActivateTurretDesc: Select a target location to immediately launch a rocket salvo.
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_DispenseMealDesc: Immediately dispense a nutrient paste meal and place it at the interaction spot.
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_ContinuousDispenseDesc: Automatically dispense meals whenever the interaction spot is empty. Animals and pawns unable of manipulation can eat from the dispensed meals.
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_AdvancedFilteringDesc:
Strips ingredient records from dispensed meals.

Pawns will not get mood penalties tied to specific ingredients (e.g. carnivores eating vegetables, ate-raw-meal triggers from raw inputs).

Meals stack with each other regardless of which ingredients went into them.
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_DetonateDesc: Overload the heater to scatter flames and detonate nearby explosives. The heater will be destroyed.
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_DetonateConfirm: Are you sure you want to detonate this heater? It will scatter flames, trigger nearby explosives, and be destroyed.
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_PumpFinishedUninstall: {0} has finished pumping. Marked for uninstallation.
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_PumpFinishedDeconstruc: {0} has finished pumping. Marked for deconstruction.
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_SwapTurret_SelectWeapo: Choose a ranged weapon from the map to mount on this turret. A colonist will haul it here and install it. Biocoded and persona weapons are not accepted.
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_SwapTurret_CancelInsta: Cancel the pending weapon installation request.
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_SwapTurret_RemoveWeapo: Eject {0} from the turret. The weapon will be dropped on the ground.
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_SwapTurret_NoWeaponsAv: No valid ranged weapons available on map.
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_BackupPower_RunOnBatte: If enabled, the generator will turn off when batteries are sufficiently full.\nIf disabled, it will only turn off when batteries are full AND current power production exceeds demand.
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_GeneratorBenefits: Benefits: • Automatic on/off based on battery levels • Configurable battery thresholds • Prevents fuel waste when not needed
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_ToxifierBenefits: Benefits: • Produces wastepacks instead of polluting terrain • 1 wastepack per day (dropped on ground, equivalent to 6 cells of vanilla pollution) • Haulers automatically collect wastepacks • Power output reduced by 100W (1400W → 1300W)
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_GeneExtractorBenefits: Benefits: • Pawns hibernate during extraction (no need degradation) • Recovery time reduced to minimum (12 days) • Targeted extraction prioritizes new genes
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_SoftscannerBenefits: Benefits: • Scanning sickness reduced by 1 day • Normal: 4 days → 3 days • Mechanitor: 2 days → 1 day
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_RipscannerBenefits: Benefits: • Harvests healthy organs before death • Organ count configurable in mod settings • Deathless subjects provide all organs
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_RipscannerHarvestedDea: Subcore ripscanner harvested all {1} organs from {0} (deathless): {2}
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_MechBoosterBenefits: Acts as a command relay: extends mechanitor range and applies a tactical relay hediff to friendly mechs in range (+10 shooting accuracy, -15% aim delay, +5 melee hit/dodge). Lets the mechanitor keep commanding mechs while incapacitated (deathrest, biosculpter, transport pod, caravan).
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_HydroponicsBenefits: Benefits: • Automatic sowing when cells are empty • Automatic harvesting when crops are ready • Built-in sun lamp (toggleable, +120W when active)
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_SunLampDesc: Toggle the built-in sun lamp. When enabled, the hydroponics basin provides light for plant growth during daylight hours (6 AM to midnight).\n\nPower: +120W when active.
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_ProximityDetectorBenef: Benefits: • Precise tracking of invisible creatures • Visual markers at creature locations • Tracked creatures become targetable (with -70% shooter accuracy) • Emergency reveal mode (causes breakdown)
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_EmergencyRevealDesc: Overload the detector to reveal all tracked invisible creatures. This will cause the detector to break down and require repairs.
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_EmergencyRevealConfirm: Are you sure you want to overload the proximity detector? All tracked invisible creatures will be revealed, but the detector will break down and require repairs.
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_BiosculpterBenefits: Benefits: • No tuning required - accepts any pawn • Cycle speed as if tuned to occupant • Shared pod for entire colony
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_VitalsMonitorBenefits: Advanced vitals scanning makes dangerous surgeries more predictable. A skilled surgeon can use it to avoid catastrophic failures.
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_MultiAnalyzerBenefits: Benefits: • Enables automated research bench to research multi-analyzer projects • +10% research speed bonus for linked automated bench • No colonist supervision required
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_PowerSwitchBenefits: Benefits: • Remote on/off control without pawn interaction • Toggle power to connected devices instantly
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_GrowthVatBenefits: Benefits: • Enhanced embryo development quality • Accelerated vat learning • Passion-focused training for better skill retention
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_BandNodeBenefits: Benefits: • Enhanced signal amplification • Increased bandwidth capacity
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_MoisturePumpBenefits: Benefits: • Smart pumping (targets wet cells directly) • Auto-uninstall/deconstruct when finished • Displays estimated completion time
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_FallbackBenefits: Benefits: • Remote on/off control without pawn interaction • Toggle power state from anywhere on the map
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_DoorBenefits: Benefits: • Automatic door control via vanilla "Hold Open" gizmo • Lockdown mode for guests and prisoners • No pawn interaction required
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_DoorLockdownDesc: When enabled, guests and prisoners cannot open this door. Colony members can still use it normally.
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_ScannerModeDeepDesc: Scanning for deep mineral deposits. Click to switch to mountain scanning mode.
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_ScannerModeMountainDes: Revealing fogged mountain cells. Click to switch to deep resource scanning mode.
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_ScannerTargetDesc: Choose which mineral to scan for. Currently targeting: {0}
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_ScannerTargetAnyDesc: Choose which mineral to scan for. Currently scanning for any mineral (random weighted selection).
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_MountainScanComplete: Mountain scan complete. {0} tiles revealed. Switching to deep resource scanning.
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_CommsConsoleBenefits: Provides compatibility with encrypted protocols, allowing to communicate with more orbital ships.
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_OrbitalTradeBeaconBene: Doubles trade range (7.9 → 15.8 tiles) and ignores walls, allowing incoming transfers from anywhere in the extended radius.
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_SleepAcceleratorBenefi: Induces vivid dreams, ensuring a good mood at morning.
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_PilotConsoleBenefits: Implements flight assistance, allowing emergency takeoff and automated landing safety protocols.
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_AutopilotLaunchDesc: Launch gravship using autopilot with 150% piloting ability. No pilot or copilot required.
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_AutopilotIntervention: The subcore AI detected an imminent landing mishap and made emergency corrections. Crisis averted!
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_AutopilotNotReady: Gravship engine not ready for launch
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_AutopilotConfirm:
The gravship will launch immediately after you select a destination.

Only colonists already on board will travel. There is no ritual phase to add more pawns.

Proceed with autopilot launch?
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_CreateWastepackStockpi: Create a stockpile zone around this tree that accepts only wastepacks. Wastepacks here won't dissolve or deteriorate - the tree preserves and slowly consumes them.
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_ClimateBenefits: Benefits: • Automatic climate control • Remote operation
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_ScannerBenefits: Automatic scanning without supervision. Advanced signal processing allows targeted scanning.
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_VNPEGrinderBenefits: Controls temperature in the dispenser, preventing meals spoilage.
LanguageData.SubcoreAutomation_VNPEFeederBenefits: Controls temperature in the dispenser, preventing meals spoilage.
